subcodes.first_line: Verily, He counseled the servants and them that were in the Bayán concerning this Manifestation that hath dawned from the horizon of the world, yet when [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انه وصی العباد و من فی البیان بهذا الظهور الظاهر من افق العالم ولکن ملا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual transformation, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
